nodes.label: LLM Wiki Pattern — Persistent Compounding Knowledge Base
nodes.rationale: Instead of RAG retrieving from raw docs at query time, LLM builds and maintains a persistent wiki incrementally: compiling knowledge once, keeping cross-references current, flagging contradictions. The wiki grows richer after every source and question, while the LLM does all bookkeeping the human cannot sustain.
nodes.norm_label: llm wiki pattern — persistent compounding knowledge base

nodes.label: 3-Layer KB Architecture: raw / wiki / schema
nodes.rationale: raw/ = immutable source of truth; wiki/ = LLM-owned markdown the LLM writes and humans read; schema (CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md) = operating contract co-evolved by human and LLM. This separation prevents the LLM from corrupting primary sources while allowing full creative ownership of the wiki layer.

nodes.label: Hybrid 3-Tier Pricing Model (contract / expiring / live)
nodes.rationale: Tier 1 (green): seasonal contract rates stored in KB with valid_until, machine-readable VND integers. Tier 2 (yellow): any price with valid_until; agent flags expired prices. Tier 3 (red): real-time only — especially airline fares — not stored; always fetched live via fast-flights tool. Airlines have no rate_sheets; only commission/terms stored.

nodes.label: Supplier-Centric 5-Entity Data Model
nodes.rationale: Data model: Destination → Supplier (core entity with rate_sheets) → Tour Product (reusable itinerary) → Quote (instance for specific customer). Supplier is the pivotal node because pricing, availability, and contracting all anchor there. Concept pages (seasonality, visa, markup-policy) cut across all entity types.

nodes.label: AI Sales Copilot Agent (elicit → design → quote → save)
nodes.rationale: 4-tool agent: kb_query (with confidential filter), flight_search (fast-flights), quote_calc (deterministic Python, no LLM math), save_quote (manual human-in-the-loop gate). Runs Claude claude-sonnet-4-6 by default; state machine: ELICIT→DESIGN→QUOTE→CONFIRM. Designed CLI-first, reused as web backend without changing core.
nodes.norm_label: ai sales copilot agent (elicit → design → quote → save)

nodes.label: Spec-Driven Development (Spec Kit methodology)
nodes.rationale: Flips traditional development: specifications become executable and directly generate implementations rather than just guiding them. Workflow: constitution → specify → plan → tasks → implement. Multi-step refinement over one-shot generation. Works with 30+ AI coding agents.

nodes.label: Save Gate — Human-in-the-Loop UI Pattern
nodes.rationale: Instead of the CLI y/n prompt, the Streamlit web app exposes a Duyệt/Không button pair so the human explicitly approves before any agent-generated content is persisted to the wiki. Keeps the human in control of KB mutations without changing agent logic.

nodes.label: Land/Air Cost Split Principle (rationale for tiered markup)
nodes.rationale: Air tickets constitute 46–71% of total cost depending on route. A single blended markup causes systematic mispricing for FIT and small groups. Splitting into Land (20% markup, controllable) and Air (3% pass-through, near-commodity) yields accurate per-segment margin control and reflects actual cost structure.
nodes.norm_label: land/air cost split principle (rationale for tiered markup)

nodes.label: Agent Margin Threshold System (Green/Yellow/Red/Block guardrails)
nodes.rationale: Sales Copilot agent enforces margin guardrails automatically: ≥10% auto-approve, 7–9.9% sales-flag, 5–6.9% requires director signature, <5% system blocks quote output. Prevents agents from generating below-floor pricing without human escalation.
